title: yfinance Live Equity Data — NVDA, MAN, UPS, RHI, PLTR, META, AMN, KELYA, ASGN, MSFT, IBM, CRM, XLK, XLI, XLY, XLP, TLT, ^VIX, ^TNX, ^GSPC
summary: Live equity closing prices for 24 tickers pulled Jan 2022–Mar 2026, used for all normalized return calculations and sector divergence charts.

title: BLS Establishment Survey — Sector Employment Estimates (FRED Public CSV)
publisher: Bureau of Labor Statistics / Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
summary: Monthly employment levels by sector (Information, Transportation, Healthcare, Manufacturing) 2020–2026, used to construct sector displacement trend analysis.

title: BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS) 2020–2025
summary: Mean annual wages by occupation used to construct wage polarization analysis across 9 role categories from AI engineers to medical scribes.

title: Layoffs.fyi Corporate Layoff Tracker 2022–2026
publisher: Layoffs.fyi (aggregated from company press releases and SEC filings)
summary: Comprehensive database of announced corporate layoffs with company names, headcounts, dates, and stated reasons; used to compile the 186,600+ AI-attributed cuts dataset.

title: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna: 7,800 Jobs to Be Replaced by AI Over 5 Years
summary: IBM CEO explicitly stated 7,800 back-office positions (HR, finance) would be replaced by AI/automation; hiring freeze enacted concurrently.

title: Salesforce Agentforce Launch — AI Agents Replacing Customer Service Roles
summary: Salesforce launched Agentforce autonomous AI customer service agents, with Marc Benioff publicly attributing headcount reductions to AI agent deployment.

title: UPS Announces 12,000 Job Cuts Amid Automation Rollout, Amazon Volume Loss
summary: UPS announced 12,000 layoffs coinciding with expanded warehouse automation program and loss of Amazon parcel delivery contract.

title: FOMC Meeting Minutes — June 2025: Labor Market Structural Concerns
summary: June 2025 FOMC cut of 25bps cited 'persistent softness in mid-skill labor categories' and 'structural features of labor demand' as contributing factors alongside inflation progress.

title: Historical Labor Displacement: Dot-com, GFC, 1980s Manufacturing — BLS Research
summary: Academic and BLS research on historical labor disruption magnitudes and recovery timelines used for Chart 6 historical precedent comparison.

title: DOGE Federal Workforce Reduction — 2025 Federal Employment Impact
summary: Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) workforce reduction program initiated February 2025, resulting in 100,000–150,000 federal civilian job eliminations per published reporting.

title: Microsoft Nuance DAX — AI Ambient Documentation Replacing Medical Scribes
summary: Microsoft DAX AI documentation platform has been deployed at 150+ health systems, directly displacing medical scribe roles; supports -27% wage decline finding for scribes.

title: Cisco Earnings Call: 'AI Will Replace 40% of Tasks' — 12,500 Layoffs
summary: Cisco CEO stated AI automation would replace 40% of enterprise tasks; announced 12,500 layoffs concurrent with AI restructuring program.
